reason: This tweet is a general commentary on religious moderation vs extremism, using a somewhat humorous tone to criticize those who try to police others' religious practices. It does not promote violence or ISIS ideology.
taxonomy_labels: Religion and Spirituality -> Islamic Teachings and Quotes
original_post: المسلم المعتدل هو من يهتم بعلاقته مع الله... أما المسلم المتشدد هو من يهتم بعلاقة جاره مع الله !! #رابطة_عشاق_الصباح
